name: Hare Menjou
description:
Height: 165 cm (5’5”) 
 Birthday: July 4, 2013.  

Shu's classmate. They live in the same apartment building and they've been together since junior high school.   ~! She has a crush on Shu and confesses to him in episode 15 of the anime.  She dies while healing Shu, who tried to save her from a car explosion, because her Void got shot by a helicopter, causing her to crystallize. She then disintegrates when Shu embraces her and disappears.!~
